description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image with a global before_script that runs python -V. Define three jobs: pages, run, and test. The pages job runs in the default stage, executes pip install sphinx sphinx-rtd-theme, cd doc ; make html, mv build/html/ ../public/, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch. The run job runs in the default stage, builds a wheel with python setup.py bdist_wheel, installs the wheel with pip install dist/*, and stores the resulting *.whl files in dist/ as an artifact. The test job runs in the default stage, runs python setup.py test, installs tox and flake8, and executes tox -e py36,flake8.
